_comment: AWS SNS sends this exact structure as the FIRST request to your n8n webhook URL immediately after 'terraform apply' creates the aws_sns_topic_subscription resource. You must visit the SubscribeURL to confirm the subscription before live alarm notifications will be delivered. See stage7-bridge-setup.md for instructions.
Message: You have chosen to subscribe to the topic arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:devsecops-prod-security-alerts. To confirm the subscription, visit the SubscribeURL included in this message.
